description: Game log styling: VP/PV text in bold red with icon, and coin/moneda text in bold gold with icon
steps: In src/components/GameLog.tsx, modify the VP pattern replacement (step 5 in renderLogEntry) to style the VP/PV text AND its adjacent number in bold red color (#E63946) alongside the VPIcon. The pattern should match sequences like '3 VP' or '4 PV' and render the number and keyword together in bold red with the icon.

In src/components/GameLog.tsx, modify the coin pattern replacement (step 7 in renderLogEntry) to style the coin/moneda text AND its adjacent number in bold gold color (#DAA520) alongside the CoinIcon. The pattern should match sequences like '3 monedas' or '5 coins' and render the number and keyword together in bold gold with the icon.
Ensure the regex patterns capture the preceding number so the entire amount+keyword is styled together (e.g., '4 VP' becomes bold red '4 VP' + icon).
acceptance_criteria: Log entries showing VP/PV amounts display the number and VP/PV keyword in bold red (#E63946) with the VP icon
Log entries showing coin/moneda amounts display the number and coin keyword in bold gold (#DAA520) with the coin icon
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc --noEmit` and confirm zero errors
findings: Modified VP and coin patterns in GameLog.tsx renderLogEntry to capture preceding numbers with optional pattern (/(\ d+\s*)?\b/). Added color and fontWeight styles inline. Both tsc --noEmit and vite build pass cleanly.
